leadText: The Magnet (Japanese: じしゃく Magnet) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II that boosts the power of Electric-type moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves by 10%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves by 20%.
